findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark. [<main>]

findings.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark [<main>]

Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable [<main>]

findings.description: The North Carolina state seal image at the top of the letter is missing in the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the North Carolina state seal/emblem centered at the top of the letterhead. The HTML version does not include this image.

findings.description: The DEQ logo at the bottom of the PDF letter is missing in the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the North Carolina DEQ logo at the bottom of the page. The HTML version does not include this logo image.

findings.description: David Miller's handwritten signature is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a handwritten signature above 'David Miller, PE'. The HTML version has only the typed name without the signature image.

findings.description: Brian Wrenn's handwritten signature is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows a handwritten signature above 'Brian Wrenn, Director'. The HTML version has only the typed name without the signature image.

findings.description: Brenda Harris's handwritten signature is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows a handwritten signature above 'Brenda Harris'. The HTML version has only the typed name without the signature image.

findings.description: The PDF contains images (state seal logo, DEQ logo, and two handwritten signatures) but the HTML has no tags at all. These images are completely omitted.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has the NC state seal, a DEQ logo at the bottom, and David Miller's signature. PDF page 2 has Brian Wrenn's signature and Brenda Harris's signature. None are represented in the HTML.
